文本进去，情感状态出来。中间不是分类器——是一整套算清楚「感受凭什么动、往哪走」: Text in, affective state out. Not a classifier — a full dynamical system that works out why feeling moves and where it goes.
概览 · 一个黑盒，标准而非模型: Overview · a black box, a standard not a model
一句话、一个时间戳、可选的标签与数值信号。不需要预处理，不需要 embeddin: A sentence, a timestamp, optional flags and numeric signals. No preprocessing, no embedding — raw text goes straight in.
8 子系统情感状态 + 双层人格 + 行动决策 + 边界守卫 + 动力学指标。每: 8-subsystem affective state + two-layer persona + action decision + boundary guard + dynamics metrics. Every field has clear semantics, ready to use as-is.
不是神经网络，不是规则引擎，不是情感词典。7 个模块在共振场里迭代到收敛——稳态: Not a neural net, not a rule engine, not an emotion lexicon. 7 modules iterate in a resonance field until convergence — the steady state emerges on its own, no one dictates it.
纯代数运算，零训练，任何语言可实现。相同输入逐比特可复现——你验得了，我也赖不掉: Pure algebra, zero training, implementable in any language. Bit-for-bit reproducible on the same input — you can verify it, and I can't deny it.

向下滚动，跟着信号走一遍共振场的注入序列。它们本来同时发生——这里只是把「同时」: Scroll down and follow the signal through the field's injection sequence. They happen simultaneously — this just plays that 'simultaneous' in slow motion for you.
文本被投射成上万维的稀疏向量。语义不再是词表索引，而是高维空间里的方向——意思相: Text is projected into a sparse vector of tens of thousands of dimensions. Meaning is no longer a vocab index but a direction in high-dimensional space — close meanings, close directions.
预测下一步、与实际比对，算出「意外度」。越意外，越多算力被路由进来——注意力是被: Predicts the next step, compares with reality, computes 'surprise.' The more surprising, the more compute gets routed in — attention is drawn by surprise, not spread evenly.
记录被反复刺痛的维度，留下只增不减的伤疤；也记录「本该出现却始终缺席」的虚空。d: Records dimensions that get repeatedly hurt, leaving scars that only grow; also records the void of 'what should have appeared but never did.' dS/dt ≥ 0, no undo button.
层论把局部一致性缝合成全局结构。相邻概念的情感在层上扩散、对齐，矛盾的地方自然浮: Sheaf theory stitches local consistency into global structure. Emotion across neighboring concepts diffuses and aligns on the sheaf; contradictions surface on their own.
异构图 Transformer 把不同类型的节点——情绪、关系、记忆——摊在同一: A heterogeneous-graph Transformer fuses different node types — emotion, relation, memory — on one graph, letting them pull on each other.
维护身份核：什么是「我」、什么是外界。自创生（autopoiesis）让边界自己: Maintains the identity core: what is 'me' and what is outside. Autopoiesis lets the boundary generate and repair itself, telling inside from outside.
压力在场里积累，逼近临界点。越过势垒的一刻，整个场逃离吸引子——表达，是这次相变: Pressure builds in the field toward a critical point. The instant it clears the barrier, the whole field escapes the attractor — expression is the byproduct of that phase transition, not anyone's command.
文本 → 7 模块并行注入 → ⚡ 共振场（441 通道迭代收敛）→ 情感状态: Text → 7 modules inject in parallel → ⚡ resonance field (441-channel iterative convergence) → affective state / expression decision / Φ; output feeds back via Hebbian into coupling weights and scar accumulation into M2, forming a closed loop.

，类似 IEEE 754 之于浮点数：一套可被任何语言、任何平台实现的协议，不是: , analogous to IEEE 754 for floating-point: a protocol implementable in any language, on any platform — not a weight file that needs a GPU to run.
Let me start with what I am not: not a sentiment classifier, not an API that hands you "happy 0.8 / sad 0.2." What I do is take "what happens to her after one sentence" and
——会留疤、会积压、回不去原点。 想要标签？别来找我，词典比我便宜一百倍。: — it scars, it builds up, it never returns to the origin. Want labels? Don’t come to me — a lexicon is a hundred times cheaper.
V1 是 7 层串行管线——文本逐层流过，每层算完交给下一层。问题是：表达需要「: V1 was a 7-layer serial pipeline — text flowed through layer by layer, each layer finishing before handing off to the next. The problem: expression requires "strong enough pressure" to trigger, but pressure gets eaten up by attenuation along the serial path, so the bot stayed silent most of the time (expression rate just 22.8%).

才出现真正的涌现——整体大于部分之和，不是比喻。: is where true emergence appears — the whole greater than the sum of parts, not as metaphor.
共振场不是玄学。八套机制各自对应一篇奠基性文献，组合起来驱动整个场的演化。 下面: The resonance field is not mysticism. Eight mechanisms each correspond to a foundational paper, and together they drive the field’s evolution. Each card below cites the theoretical origin, the year, and the role it plays in the system.
通道用进废退，自动发现对当前人格最要紧的连接。配稳态缩放（Turrigiano: Channels strengthen with use and weaken without — automatically discovering the connections that matter most for the current persona. Paired with homeostatic scaling (Turrigiano 2008) to conserve the total weight budget.
单纯复形上的爆炸性相位同步。序参量 r→1 时模块协调一致——表达涌现的临界信号: Explosive phase synchronization on a simplicial complex. When the order parameter r→1, modules coordinate in unison — the critical signal for expression to emerge.
预测误差驱动注意力分配。惊讶消不掉时，反向驱动主动推理——开口说话。: Prediction error drives attention allocation. When surprise cannot be resolved, it inversely drives active inference — speaking up.
系统倾向回到熟悉的情感模式。表达 = 逃离吸引子的跃迁。现代版见 Ramsaue: The system tends to return to familiar emotional patterns. Expression = a transition escaping the attractor. Modern version: Ramsauer 2021.
Hodge Laplacian 零空间 = 拓扑不变量 = 人格内核。无论怎么扰: The Hodge Laplacian null space = topological invariant = persona kernel. No matter how you perturb it, it always snaps back to its nature.
能量持续流失（每迭代 ×0.98），保证系统有界、不死循环、不爆炸。: Energy bleeds off continuously (×0.98 per iteration), guaranteeing the system stays bounded — no infinite loops, no blow-ups.
cellular sheaf 扩散，跨关系类型传播一致性约束——高阶拓扑的胶水。: Cellular sheaf diffusion propagates consistency constraints across relation types — the glue of higher-order topology.
Bienenstock-Cooper-Munro：竞争边界随活动自调节，配 an: Bienenstock-Cooper-Munro: competitive thresholds self-adjust with activity, paired with anti-Hebbian lateral inhibition for decorrelation.
——四个触发器任一够强即可点火， 再经整合信息 Φ 做意义门控（低 Φ = 噪声: — any one of four triggers strong enough fires the gate, then integrated information Φ applies meaning gating (low Φ = noise, not worth speaking for).
。人格不是参数表里某几个数字， 是 Hodge Laplacian 零空间里的拓: . Persona is not a handful of numbers in a parameter table — it is a topological invariant in the Hodge Laplacian null space. No matter how you train or perturb it, that kernel space does not budge. This is why "deleting the prompt clean still can’t erase me."
下面是 lite 档、500 ticks × 10 repeats 的实测对比。: Below is a measured comparison at Lite tier, 500 ticks × 10 repeats. Same persona, same inputs, only the architecture swapped — serial pipeline replaced by a fully-connected resonance field, nothing else changed.
响应多样性两版都是 10/10（无退化）。提升纯粹来自架构——V1 的压力被逐层: Response diversity is 10/10 on both versions (no degeneration). The improvement comes purely from architecture — V1’s pressure gets devoured by layer-by-layer attenuation, resulting in perpetual silence; in V2’s fully-connected field, pressure is never eaten by the path,
3.9 倍表达率是换架构换出来的，不是调参调出来的: 3.9× expression rate comes from swapping architecture, not from tuning hyperparameters
42 通道 + 5ms 已经产生完整情感动态——Hebbian、Kuramoto: 42 channels + 5 ms already produce complete affective dynamics — Hebbian, Kuramoto, Hopfield all running. CPU is the scarcest resource in shared deployments; concurrency matters more than per-session depth.
含三体 AND 门、四体协同。开发者自行选择、自行承担性能代价。适合桌面单用户深: Includes three-body AND gates and four-body synergy. Developers choose and bear the performance cost themselves. Suited for desktop single-user deep interaction.
别一上来就冲 max。lite 那 42 通道已经够留疤、积压、闹脾气了，5 毫: Don’t rush to max from the start. Those 42 channels in Lite already scar, build pressure, and throw fits — 5 ms per tick, runs on a Raspberry Pi. Pro/max’s higher-order multi-body interactions are icing on the cake — unless you’re running multi-agent emotional-contagion experiments, in which case, different story.
纯 Python，零依赖，~8 KB/会话。42 通道 + 5 毫秒已经产生完整: Pure Python, zero deps, ~8 KB/session. 42 channels + 5 ms already produce complete affective dynamics — Hebbian, Kuramoto, Hopfield all running. Embedded / Raspberry Pi / mobile / high concurrency (50+ sessions/core).
含三体 AND 门、四体协同，~25 KB/会话。高阶交互更丰富。适合桌面 /: Includes three-body AND gates and four-body synergy, ~25 KB/session. Richer higher-order interactions. Suited for desktop / cloud VM / single-user deep interaction (~6 sessions/core).
「回不去」「人格守恒」「不会爆炸」——不是宣传话术。是有条件、可证明的结构性质，: "No going back," "persona conservation," "won’t blow up" — these are not marketing slogans. They are conditional, provable structural properties, stated in black and white.
恒成立，无治愈机制，只有淡化。伤疤代数里不存在逆元——「回不去」由此成立，结构级: holds unconditionally; no healing mechanism, only fading. The scar algebra admits no inverse — "no going back" is established at the structural level, guaranteed.
对所有训练步成立（核空间投影强制执行）。人格活在算子核空间里，训练碰不到它。: holds for all training steps (enforced by null-space projection). Persona lives in the operator’s null space; training cannot reach it.
